name: QRCode
description: Renders a QR code SVG for a string payload.

api.name: QRCode
api.description: Renders a QR code SVG for a string payload.

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Override the accessible label announced for the QR code. Defaults to "QR code: {Value}". Useful when the encoded payload is a long URL or technical string the user doesn't need read out — pass a human-friendly description instead.

examples.title: Error Correction Level (interactive)
examples.code:
<Segmented @bind-Value="_level">
    <SegmentedItem Value="@QRCode.QRErrorLevel.Low">Low</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="@QRCode.QRErrorLevel.Medium">Medium</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="@QRCode.QRErrorLevel.Quartile">Quartile</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="@QRCode.QRErrorLevel.High">High</SegmentedItem>
</Segmented>
<QRCode Value="https://lumeo.nativ.sh/" Size="160" ErrorCorrectionLevel="@_level" />

@code { private QRCode.QRErrorLevel _level = QRCode.QRErrorLevel.Medium; }

mdSummary:
# QRCode

Renders a QR code SVG for a string payload.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display/Status & Indicators
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/qr-code

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| QRCode | Value | `string?` | `` |  |
| QRCode | Size | `int` | `200` |  |
| QRCode | ErrorCorrectionLevel | `QRErrorLevel` | `QRErrorLevel.Medium` |  |
| QRCode | ForegroundColor | `string` | `"currentColor"` |  |
| QRCode | BackgroundColor | `string` | `"transparent"` |  |
| QRCode | IncludeMargin | `bool` | `true` |  |
| QRCode | ImageSrc | `string?` | `` |  |
| QRCode | ImageSize | `int` | `40` |  |
| QRCode | AriaLabel | `string?` | `` | Override the accessible label announced for the QR code. Defaults to "QR code: {Value}". Useful when the encoded payload is a long URL or technical string the user doesn't need read out — pass a human-friendly description instead. |
| QRCode | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| QRCode | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<QRCode />
```

## CSS variables
`--radius`

## Files
- `UI/QRCode/QRCode.razor`
